Campaign Map plan · Chunk C2 · positioning tool

Drag every city pin onto its real spot

Starting positions below are my best guess from eyeballing the mosaic — drag any pin to correct it. The panel on the right updates live and gives you a paste-ready coordinate block when you're happy.

ITALY MOSAIC
drag pins to reposition

Live coordinates

Notes

  • Pin colour = region controller at game start (gold = heartland, olive = Roman, purple = Carthage, teal = independent) — same coding as the shading mockup, just no halos this round.
  • The output block matches cityDefinitions.ts's literal nodeX/nodeY fields exactly — paste straight over the existing values once you're happy.
  • Positions are fractions of the full mosaic image (1024×1536), same convention as today's map.
